title: Update Services page with 6 categories, sub-items, and sample pictures

requirements.text: Update the ServicesPage to display exactly 6 service categories, each with its listed sub-items and a sample image: (1) Design Services — Logo Design, Brand Identity, Marketing Materials, Social Media Graphics, Packaging Design, Photo Editing; (2) Digital Printing — Business Cards, Flyers & Brochures, Posters, Letterheads, Envelopes, Books; (3) Outdoor Printing — Flex Banners, Star Flex, Signboards, Canvas; (4) Indoor Printing — Stickers (Die-cut), Stickers (White/Black/Grey back), Transparent Stickers, Vinyl Printing, Indoor Banners, Canvas Prints, Posters; (5) Screen Printing & Personalization — Pen Printing, T-Shirt Printing, Balloon Printing, Sublimation Printing, DTF (Direct to Film) Printing; (6) Offset Printing — with description 'Cost-effective bulk printing with consistent quality for large volume orders' and sub-items: Magazines, Catalogs, Books, Packaging / Cardboard Boxes, Paper Bags. Each category card must display its sample image (from frontend/public/assets/generated/), the category title, the sub-item list, and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button.

quotes:
1. Design Services
* Logo Design
* Brand Identity
* Marketing Materials
* Social Media Graphics

* Photo Editing

* T-Shirt Printing
* Balloon Printing
* Sublimation Printing
* DTF (Direct to Film) Printing

F. Offset Printing
* Cost-effective bulk printing with consistent quality for large volume orders.

acceptanceCriteria: Exactly 6 service category sections are displayed on the Services page.
Each category shows its correct title and full sub-item list as specified.
Each category card displays a relevant sample image loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated/.
Offset Printing section includes the descriptive tagline about cost-effective bulk printing.
Each category card includes a 'Get a Quote' CTA button linking to the quotation request page.
Layout is responsive and consistent across mobile and desktop views.

requirements.text: Render the 6 generated service category sample images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated/ and reference them in the ServicesPage component.

quotes: need to change our services with sample pictures

acceptanceCriteria: All 6 service category images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/ with the correct filenames.
Each image is displayed in the corresponding service category card on the Services page.
Images load correctly without broken links.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All user-facing text must be in English.
Static images must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/, not through the backend.
nonGoals: Adding or modifying backend service data models.
Changing any other pages beyond ServicesPage.
Adding Telugu translations for the new service content in this request.

required: Graphic design workspace with colorful logos and brand identity materials on a desk (service-design.dim_800x500.png)
Stack of professionally printed business cards, flyers and brochures on a clean surface (service-digital-printing.dim_800x500.png)
Large outdoor flex banner and signboard installation on a building exterior (service-outdoor-printing.dim_800x500.png)
Collection of die-cut stickers, vinyl prints and indoor banners displayed on a wall (service-indoor-printing.dim_800x500.png)
Colorful custom printed t-shirts, pens and balloons arranged together (service-screen-printing.dim_800x500.png)
Offset printing press machine with stacked magazines, catalogs and paper bags (service-offset-printing.dim_800x500.png)
